programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Rounded-top windows are installed. Easy-install roof shingles go down. Roger takes Kevin fishing. Tommy adds a diamond shingle siding detail. Radiant heat goes in somewhere unexpected: the ceiling.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy repairs 130-year-old pocket doors. A new type of solar goes in. Jenn works with landscaper Fred to build a boulder wall. Richard gives a lesson on the modern furnace. Father Mark and son Erik Ferrante showcase the art of mosaic tile installation.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Original leaded glass windows are repaired. Jenn and Fred plant a bed of perennials along the new driveway. Mini splits solve a ductwork problem. Homeowner Molly and her designer Shelby make design decisions. Tommy tackles tricky original trim.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Richard learns about the invention of the Stillson wrench. Mauro repairs old plaster. Norm repairs broken balusters. Heath installs a new panel. Venetian plaster goes on the dining room ceiling.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A brass handrail is created. Mauro paints a chalkboard finish. Repaired balusters get reinstalled. Richard gives a lesson in make-up air. Work begins on a custom table. Heath talks smart electricity.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Work is complete on the Cape Ann Shingle Style project. The team tours the finished home, celebrating all of the repaired historic details and the new elements that keep with its original style.

programme.title: This Old House Rebuilds Marathon
programme.desc: Watch this marathon of uplifting episodes focusing on rebuilding in communities affected by natural disasters. This Old House is America’s No. 1 home enthusiast brand, offering trusted information and expert advice via Emmy award-winning television.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack challenges a guy who has insulted Furley to a boxing match. His opponent, the girls learn, is a Golden Glove contender with 22 knockouts.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Furley helps Jack lose his "I can stay away for a week" bet with the girls.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Terri believe that Janet is trying to seduce Furley's shy nephew.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Instead of catching sleep in the dingy apartment above his restaurant, Jack catches Mr. Angelino with a young woman.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri falls for Jack when he buys a mustache which makes him look like her old boyfriend.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A former cook in the Navy with Jack comes to town to con his way into a partnership in Jack's Bistro.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls fake a contest to give Jack the rent money he needs for Jack's Bistro. Their good deed turns to disaster when Jack spends the money on a leather coat.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Cheryl asks Jack to father her child, but Jack refuses. Janet thinks Cheryl wants to marry Jack because she's going to have his baby, so she talks Jack into complying with Cheryl's wishes. Guest Star(s): Joanna Kerns

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry discovers an answered magazine quiz and he and Jack think one of the girls wants to have an affair with Jack. They take the girls on a weekend trip to find out who answered the quiz so Jack can talk her out of it.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack receives $1,000 by mistake from an automated cash machine. He hides it in the couch for the weekend but when the Bank Security arrives to collect the money, it is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack writes a nasty letter to a famous food critic, thinking the critic is going to give his bistro a ruinous review. When the critic assures Jack the review will be favorable, Jack tries to retrieve the letter from the critic's desk.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is dating a sex therapist who has asked him to keep her job a secret. Janet, concluding she is a prostitute, is nasty to her and no one can understand why - especially when Janet's own father has become so friendly with her.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack has two dates, so he talks Larry into posing as him and spending the day with his unwanted date, Janet's childhood friend, who is visiting from out of town.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack believes he has won a baking contest that is open only to women. Disguised as "Grandma Tripper," he goes to collect the check and learns that he is a finalist and must bake his cookies for the company's executives to win the prize.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's father visits unexpectedly and resumes his good nature meddling. Jack explodes and tells him to stay out of his life, but when he learns his father has lost his job, Jack gives him the opportunity to be useful.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri is up for a promotion and tells Dr. Kenderson she is married to ward off his advances. When he invites himself and his wife over for dinner, Jack poses as Terri's husband while Janet and Larry pose as French-speaking house guests.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Jack attends a charity ball with a socialite and loses $15,000 gambling, Larry and the girls attempt to help him recover the money.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls flip over a handsome Englishman who moves in next door, but Jack and Furley become convinced that he is one of London's most sought after criminals.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet is thrilled with her new job as an aerobics teacher, and her new boss Tina is thrilled with Jack. When Tina blackmails Jack into being at her beck and call, Larry offers to take her off Jack's hands.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an old flame at the park who is seeking advice about her jealous husband. Furley joins them, and they all get poison oak. Later, at Jack's house, Furley tells the husband they were all in the bushes together.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Furley get locked in a freezer together. Convinced they are going to die, they have a heart-to-heart talk, and Jack confesses that he really isn't gay. Once safe, Jack worries because Furley knows the truth about him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The trio plants a stray cat at Furley's door, hoping he'll bend his rules and keep it. When a girl appears looking for her kitten, Furley lies and says he took it to the pound; so Jack and the girls search the pounds and bring home three different cats.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: After a night on the town with his old navy buddies, Jack discovers he has a tattoo on his derriere. When Jack goes to the hospital to have it removed, Janet thinks he is having a vasectomy and Furley thinks he is having a sex change.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack offers to model for a beautiful art teacher and finds himself nude in front of her classroom when Furley walks in. Jack begs Furley not to tell, but the secret is out when a nude portrait of Jack appears at the Regal Beagle.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack borrows Janet's new car to drive a gorgeous model to a photo session and totals the car on the way home. He pretends to have amnesia in the hospital, but Janet gets suspicious and concocts a plan to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A customer of the flower shop names Janet in his will, and she receives a vase. His nephew, Philip, an art collector, visits Janet, and Jack thinks he lied about the value of the vase and is trying to get it back.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an attractive stewardess, Vicky Bradford; but between her father and her dates, she doesn't seem to have time for Jack. Janet announces her engagement to Philip, while Jack is jealous and lovesick.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs James Toney
programme.desc: On November 18th, 1994, Roy Jones Jr fought James Toney for the IBF Super Middleweight Title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Jones displayed his exceptional athleticism and speed, outclassing Toney to win a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Percy Harris
programme.desc: On December 5th, 1992 Roy Jones Jr. fought Percy Harris for the WBC Continental Americas Super Middleweight title at the Trump Taj Mahal in Atlantic city with Jones defeating Harris in the 4th round by technical knockout.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Thomas Tate
programme.desc: On May 27th, 1994 Roy Jones Jr. went up against Thomas Tate in a 12 round bout for the IBF World Middleweight title that ended in the second round by technical knockout giving Jones Jr. the win.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Yuri Foreman
programme.desc: On June 5th, 2010, Miguel Cotto defeated Yuri Foreman at Yankee Stadium, claiming the WBA Super Welterweight title. Foreman's knee injury hindered his performance and Cotto won by TKO in the 9th round.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Zab Judah
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2007, Miguel Cotto fought Zab Judah in a welterweight championship bout at Madison Square Garden in New York. Cotto emerged victorious with a TKO in the 11th round, solidifying his reputation as a formidable welterweight champion.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Joshua Clottey
programme.desc: On June 13th, 2009, Miguel Cotto fought Joshua Clottey for the WBO World Welterweight Title at Madison Square Garden in New York. Despite Clottey landing more shots, Cotto was persistent with his attack, helping him earn a close split decision win.

programme.title: Evander Holyfield vs George Foreman
programme.desc: On April 19th, 1991, Evander Holyfield fought George Foreman for the WBC, WBA, and IBF Heavyweight Titles in Atlantic City. Both fighters displayed incredible skill and resilience, but Holyfield ultimately emerged victorious after 12 rounds.

programme.title: Humberto Soto vs Urbano Antillon
programme.desc: On December 4th, 2010, Humberto Soto fought Urbano Antillon for the WBC World Lightweight Title at the Honda Center in Anaheim. In a very close fight that could have gone either way, Soto came out on top victorious via an unanimous decision win.

programme.title: Johnny Tapia vs Danny Romero
programme.desc: On July 18th, 1997, Johnny Tapia fought Danny Romero for the IBF & WBO Super Flyweight Titles at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. In a highly anticipated fight and an incredible battle, Tapia came out on top with a close unanimous decision win.

programme.title: Jorge Arce vs Hussein Hussein
programme.desc: On March 19th, 2005, Jorge Arce fought Hussein Hussein in a WBC Flyweight Title Eliminator at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. In an action-packed fight, the victorious Jorge Arce scored the knockdown in the 10th round that stopped the fight.

programme.title: Jorge Arce vs Wilfredo Vazquez Jr.
programme.desc: On May 7th, 2011, Jorge Arce fought Wilfredo Vazquez Jr for the WBO Super Bantamweight Title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. In a very close fight that might have been a draw, Vazquez Jr's corner controversially threw in the towel in the final round.

programme.title: Jose Luis Castillo vs. Stevie Johnston 1
programme.desc: On June 17th, 2000, Jose Luis Castillo fought Stevie Johnston for the WBC Lightweight Title in Bell Gardens, California. In a very close fight, Castillo took the world by surprise with a majority decision victory that was The Ring Upset of the Year.

programme.title: Jose Ramirez vs Amir Imam
programme.desc: On March 17th, 2018 Jose Ramirez fought Amir Imam for the vacant WBC World Super Lightweight title at Madison Square Garden Hulu Theater in New York with the twelve-round bout ending in a unanimous decision win for Ramirez.

programme.title: Lloyd Honeyghan vs Donald Curry
programme.desc: On September 27th, 1986 Lloyd Honeyghan faced Donald Curry for the IBF, WBA and WBC World Welterweight title at the Caesars Palace in Atlantic City in a 15 round bout that ended in the sixth giving Honeyghan the win.

programme.title: Luis Alberto Lopez vs Gabe Flores
programme.desc: On September 10th, 2021, Luis Alberto Lopez fought Gabe Flores in a super featherweight bout in Tucson. In a surprising upset, Lopez won by a convincing unanimous decision.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: After seeing footage Jep shot using a GoPro, Si decides he wants to use the camera to record a day in his life. But when Si gets on the guys' nerves while they're hunting, they kick him and his GoPros out of the blind.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When the duck guys have to pull an all-nighter to finish some work, Willie decides he wants to join them. But when a dying smoke detector distracts them from their work, Jase and Willie head off to disarm it.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: After visiting a popular burger restaurant, Willie and Jase get into a debate over which of them cooks the best burger, prompting them to challenge one another to a cooking contest.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie and Jase argue over an old GI Joe toy, it leads them into a debate over who would make a better soldier. To settle the score, Willie and Jase head out to the woods with their friends and children for a paintball match.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie gets a soft serve machine for himself, he tells the guys they can't use it until they're done working. But when Jase thinks this is unfair, he takes matters into his own hands and finds a better object to use as motivation.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jase finds out Jep is planning to buy his kids a fancy playhouse from a catalog, he and the guys decide to build one for Jep them selves. But when the playhouse ends up looking more like a military-style duck blind.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Sadie spends the day at Duck Commander for a school project, the guys try to show her the ins-and-outs of how a successful company works. But when Willie questions Jase's ingenuity in creating new products they get into a debate.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertson family pulls together a family reunion to give Mia a big send-off before her surgery.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: In the season's dramatic finale, Lisa and Todd struggle to complete their daring joint venture across the frozen Hudson Bay.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: As experts predict one of the shortest and warmest winters on record, the ice road truckers face the biggest challenge in their history.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Facing a season expected to be one of the shortest on record, both teams are under pressure.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: As a short season looms, the drivers are up against it. Hundreds of miles from the nearest town, Lisa Kelly finds herself stranded.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: For 6 seasons, the Ax Men have been chasing huge paydays in the most dangerous conditions imaginable. Now, Season Seven is gearing up to be the toughest yet, and we're taking a look back at the logging legacies of the companies who have made it this far.

programme.title: Ax Men: Logged and Loaded
programme.desc: The crews of Ax Men are back and the race for green gold is on! In Washington, Rygaard pushes deep into their roughest terrain yet in an effort to recapture the title.

programme.title: Ax Men: Falling Fast
programme.desc: It's only the second week into the logging season, but it seems like the teams could already use a break. In Alaska, the Papac team fights to find a replacement to fill the shoes of injured Coatsy.

programme.title: Ax Men: Failure to Communicate
programme.desc: It's week three, and the loggers are feeling the pressure to produce. In Alaska, Coatsy is still out of commission, so Papac institutes an extremely dangerous process called Shotgun Logging.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Dinobots, Predacons, and Terrorcons suddenly desert their fellow Transformers in the midst of a life and death struggle to defeat a more dangerous, energy-draining enemy who threatens the existence of all creatures, good and bad.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Dinobots, Predacons, and Terrorcons suddenly desert their fellow Transformers in the midst of a life and death struggle to defeat a more dangerous, energy-draining enemy who threatens the existence of all creatures, good and bad.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Five thousand years ago, the Quintessons locked the planet Zamojin in a space-warp and isolated it from the rest of the universe. When that warp is breached by the Autobots, the power which the Quintessons fear most is able to escape.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Eager to destroy the Transformers, scientists infect them with a plague that will pit Autobots and Decepticons against their own kind. As it rapidly spreads to all creatures, Sky Lynx rushes to revive the only Transformer who can save them all.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As a hate plague rapidly spreads among robots and humans on Earth, a fallen leader must rise and reclaim the Matrix of Leadership from an infected Rodimus Prime in order to save the galaxy, Transformers, and all mankind.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As a hate plague rapidly spreads among robots and humans on Earth, a fallen leader must rise and reclaim the Matrix of Leadership from an infected Rodimus Prime in order to save the galaxy, Transformers, and all of mankind.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: While Optimus Prime tries to figure out where his team and the Cybertron plasma chamber key have gone, the Autobots on the planet Nebulos team up with a rebel group to defeat the evil Hive, who have enlisted help from the Decepticons to fight back.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: While Optimus Prime tries to figure out where his team and the Cybertron plasma chamber key have gone, the Autobots on the planet Nebulos team up with a rebel group to defeat the evil Hive, who have enlisted help from the Decepticons to fight back.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 3. Following a civil war on planet Cyberton, the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons are marooned and deactivated on planet Earth for 4 million years! Finally, reawakened, the battle between good and evil continues on present-day Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 3. Following a civil war on planet Cyberton, the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons are marooned and deactivated on planet Earth for 4 million years! Finally reawakened, the battle between good and evil continues on present-day Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. Using their robotic powers to hide in plain sight, the Autobots and Decepticons disguise themselves as Earth vehicles, and their war between good vs. evil continues as the Autobots try to stop the Decepticons from stealing Earth's resources.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. The Decepticons' ship to planet Cybertron is complete, and the odds are stacked against Optimus Prime, Bumblebee, Jazz and the others in the battle to stop them.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: After his accidental transportation to Cybertron, Megatron returns- and he wants to get his hands on an anti-matter formula created on Earth that could mean limitless power for the Decepticons! Bumblebee and Spike race to warn the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: While protecting an Earth military plant from a Decepticon attack, Optimus Prime is severely wounded. His only hope for survival is a new Cosmotron unit. The good news is that Wheeljack's got one—the bad news is that it's in his lab back on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: While protecting an Earth military plant from a Decepticon attack, Optimus Prime is severely wounded. His only hope for survival is a new Cosmotron unit. The good news is that Wheeljack's got one - the bad news is that it's in his lab back on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons begin to siphon the Earth's heat from the Arctic Circle and temperatures worldwide begin to drop. But unknown to the Decepticons is what, or who, they are about to release from the ice.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Inspired by dinosaur skeletons, Ratchet and Wheeljack create Grimlock, Slag, and Sludge, the Dinobots! When Autobot forces are captured by the Decepticons, it may be up to the Dinobots to save the day.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Optimus Prime assigns the Dinobots to guard a meteorite that contains new and unknown energy. Appealing to Grimlocks' simple arrogance, Megatron convinces the Dinobots to attack Optimus Prime and betray the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 3. With help from a human scientist, the Decepticons enslave people through mind control to fight against the Autobots and generate enough power for Megatron's sinister plan: bringing Cybertron into Earth's orbit to steal all of its energy.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 3. With Cybertron now in orbit, the Earth is being torn apart by geological forces and natural disasters. A small Autobot team heads to Cybertron to stop Megatron, while the rest of the Autobots try to protect Earth. But is it already too late?

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. On Cybertron, Spike and the small band of Autobots attempt to sabotage the Decepticons’ hypno-chip and free the people of Earth. Meanwhile, Optimus Prime and the remaining Autobots on Earth continue to try to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 3 of 3. On Cybertron, Spike and the small band of Autobots attempt to sabotage the Decepticons' hypno-chip and free the people of Earth. Meanwhile, Optimus Prime and the remaining Autobots on Earth continue to try to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Deep in the “Demon Swamp” on the island of Bali, large robotic insects are eating everything in their path and terrorizing the islanders. Megatron realizes they are an ancient breed of Decepticons, and forms an alliance with these powerful Insecticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As Optimus Prime and Megatron prepare to face off in a duel, Megatron secretly plots to unleash the latest addition to his Decepticon army—the Constructicons – along with Devastator, a Decepticon unlike any the Autobots have ever seen before!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When Spike is wounded and knocked unconscious in a Decepticon attack, Sparkplug and Wheeljack reluctantly transfer his consciousness into their experimental robot, Autobot X, to save him.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: With Wheeljacks' newest invention, The Immobilizer, any object in motion can be frozen. Although it may prove valuable in the fight against evil, it may also prove too dangerous to exist…especially once Megatron gets his hands on it.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Wheeljacks' newest invention, The Immobilizer, can freeze any object in motion. It could be a valuable tool in the Autobot's fight against evil, but it may also prove to be too dangerous to exist,especially after Megatron gets his hands on it.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Time portals are opening up all over the world due to the Decepticons having tapped into the mysterious energy on the island. The Autobots have their hands full trying to keep the peace and return everyone and everything to the correct time.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Accused of treason, Mirage sets out on his own to stop the Decepticons and Insecticons, as well as prove himself innocent. But when his plan to play the two evil forces against each other fails, a chain of events is set off where no one can be trusted.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bart wagers to save the lives of his fellow stagecoach travelers--who dislike gamblers--when the coach is held up and Bart makes an unusual bet with the bandits.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: When a man claiming to be a leprechaun promises Bart five wishes, Bart is surprised when the first wish comes true. But the money the "leprechaun" grants turns out to be stolen.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: When Bart's poker winnings include partial ownership of a casino, blackmail is part of the pot, and he starts to believe that murder may be the final payout for life as a gambler.

programme.title: Maverick
programme.desc: Bart wins a newspaper in a poker game, only to discover that the paper is being sued by a powerful senator for libel.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: The World's Fastest Gun,' Billy Denver, comes to Tombstone to perform. Challenged by Johnny's Pearce, he faces his first human target - and kills him. When Johnny's brother hears the news, he heads for Tombstone to avenge his brother's death.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Elias Ransome brings his band of religious emigrants to the outskirts of Tombstone, but a prejudiced rancher stirs up agitation against the newcomers, leading to an air of intolerance. Hollister and Clabourne must step in to resolve the situation.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: A gunslinger en route to Durango seeks Doc Holliday to gun him down for the murder of his brother. Passing through Tombstone, he becomes the enemy of two of the West's slickest draws -- Sheriff Hollister and the infamous dentist-turned-gunman.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: A handsome cowboy makes eyes at an immigrant miner's pretty daughter and upsets her staid European ideals. Betrothed by her father to a young miner, she forsakes him and her old-world traditions by leaving home to become an 'American lady.'

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: George and Patricia Camden, two people out of rancher Aaron McClain's shady past, blackmail him. Aided by a mysterious accomplice, McClain evens the score by murdering George, and Sheriff Hollister is plunged into a dangerous manhunt.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Old Man Clinton forces Bill Doolin - just out of prison - into an attempt to kill Sheriff Clay Hollister as Clay is the only witness against his two renegade sons. Dooline picks a fight with Clay who risks his life to get to the bottom of the plot.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Julie Dixon takes a job as a dealer in Tombstone's Saloon. Here, she deals a grim hand of vengeance. Her brother Sam, an incurable gambler, had killed Julie's lover six months before. She has taken the job as part of a plan to wreak revenge on Sam.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Convicted of murder, Vince Harper breaks jail and seeks refuge with an old friend: Editor Claibourne. Believing in Harper's innocence, the editor agrees to hide him until he can uncover new evidence, leading Sheriff Hollister to strike a deal.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson is a gambler, empire-builder, Indian-fighter and journalist. He uses his derringer and gold-headed cane to win the justice he believes to be right.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson's friend 'Cactus Charlie' Hayden strikes gold. When he repays Bat for staking him it's revealed that the gold is part of a missing shipment. Bat and Hayden set out to make the best of a bad situation - and do so.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Though his sympathies lay with the open-range cattleman in their fight against their old enemy, the railroads, Bat Masterson doesn't countenance their lawlessness. So, Bat finds himself in opposition to his friends.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Bat Masterson, the Frontier's best turkey shoot judge, has his hands full at Midas Creek. The town council hires him to serve a double purpose - judge the turkey shoot and make sure that bully-boy Rance Fletcher doesn't mess up the fun.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Investor Bat Masterson, in partnership with mine owner Augustus Ulbrecht, reaps the wages of mismanagement. Ulbrecht, indifferent to the safety of the men, forces them to work despite reports that the diggings are about to cave in.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: When Sir Edward Marion unexpectedly downs a famous 'fast gun,' he attains a certain dangerous notoriety. This brings him to the notice of Bat Masterson with whom he exchanges some unusual demonstrations of fancy gunmanship.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Gambling Hall Owner Bat Masterson is mystified when business booms but profits plummet. Investigating, he finds his partner's fingers in the cash drawer - and slams it shut.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
programme.desc: Gallant Bat Masterson turns Cupid's little mailman. When the man escorting three mail-order brides to Noble Creek, is shot, Bat becomes his replacement. For some unknown reason, a certain 'hot gun' doesn't want the gals to arrive.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Thad Milburn is fed up with being cheated by people in Dodge City causing him to wound two people and take refuge in a warehouse. Earp decides to investigate the situation.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Dora is forcing Kelly to sell his saloon so Albright and McGuire see an opportunity to not only buy it but to get rid of Earp.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: As Jim Kelly and Dora Hand prepare to wed, Jim Rellance from Texas hopes to marry Dora. Dora tells him to find a younger girl and Earp tells him to leave Dodge City.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
